name: International Pawn Gun & Gold
description_short: Orlando-based pawn shop offering collateral-based loans at 10% interest, plus buying and selling of jewelry, firearms, electronics, and luxury goods with no credit checks required.
description_long:
International Pawn Gun & Gold is a pawn shop located in East Orlando, Florida (10209 E Colonial Dr Suite 190), operating as a full-service collateral lending and retail establishment. The business specializes in pawning items as collateral for short-term loans, as well as buying and selling used merchandise across multiple categories. Founded with an emphasis on customer service and item authenticity, the company has built its reputation through social media presence and word-of-mouth referrals in the Central Florida market, particularly near the UCF area.

The company's primary service is offering pawn loans at a flat 10% interest rate with no credit checks required, allowing customers to use personal items as collateral for quick cash. Beyond lending, International Pawn buys and sells a diverse inventory including jewelry (gold, engagement rings, wedding bands, Cuban link bracelets), luxury watches (Rolex), firearms and ammunition, electronics (laptops, desktops, monitors, PS5 consoles), tools, lawn equipment, kitchenware, household items, and DVDs. All items offered for sale are reportedly hand-verified by store managers for authenticity and functionality before purchase.

What distinguishes International Pawn is its stated commitment to item authentication and customer relationship building. Management emphasizes that every item is hand-picked and tested before sale, with managers verifying authenticity and condition. The company highlights free evaluations, air-conditioned and secure storage, flexible terms for loan renewal, convenient East Orlando location with parking, and a philosophy of treating both merchandise and customers with respect. Their social media presence showcases high-end luxury inventory (Rolex watches, designer jewelry) and regularly updated stock.

However, potential borrowers should note that while 10% interest appears competitive, pawn loans remain short-term debt solutions with mandatory renewal or item forfeiture. The company's Instagram presence shows posts dating back 2-3 years, suggesting the social media strategy may not be actively maintained. No information is provided on loan terms, renewal periods, fees for storage or other services, late payment consequences, or redemption policies. The website lacks transparency on these standard pawn shop details that borrowers should understand before pledging items.
address: 10209 E Colonial Dr Suite 190, Orlando, FL 32817

company_info.headquarters: 10209 E Colonial Dr Suite 190, Orlando, FL 32817

pros: 10% interest rate on pawn loans, stated as competitive for the area
No credit checks required for loan approval
Free evaluations of items before pawning or selling
Managers hand-verify authenticity and test all items before resale
Air-conditioned and secure storage for pawned items
Diverse inventory across jewelry, firearms, electronics, and luxury goods
Flexible loan renewal options without forced asset sale
cons: Website lacks critical pawn loan details (specific terms, renewal periods, storage fees, late payment consequences)
No transparent disclosure of redemption policies or what happens to unredeemed items
Social media updates have not been recent (2-3 years old), suggesting limited active digital presence
Pawn loans are inherently short-term solutions with risk of item loss if unable to renew
No information on whether the business is licensed or regulated by Florida state pawn broker authorities
best_for: Individuals needing quick cash who have valuable items (jewelry, electronics, firearms) to use as collateral
People with poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans or credit products
Shoppers seeking discounted luxury goods (watches, gold jewelry, high-end electronics) from verified inventory
Those looking for firearms and ammunition with local brick-and-mortar purchasing options
diagnosis: International Pawn is best suited for borrowers who own valuable collateral (jewelry, electronics, firearms) and need immediate cash without credit qualification, or for bargain hunters seeking authenticated luxury goods at discounted prices. The critical caveat is that pawn loans are short-term debt solutions with mandatory renewal or asset forfeiture—borrowers should fully understand redemption terms and fees before pledging items, though the website does not transparently disclose these essential details.
services: Loan renewal options for additional terms
Item purchase (selling items directly to the shop)
Item sales (retail merchandise from store inventory)
Electronics sales (laptops, desktops, monitors, gaming consoles)
